novel_features.name: Today View
novel_features.description: See all of your assigned issues across every team for today, ranked by priority and cycle deadline.

novel_features.name: Bottleneck Detection
novel_features.description: See which team members are overloaded and which issues are blocked before sprint planning.

novel_features.name: Project Burndown
novel_features.description: Project a project's landing date by linear-regressing remaining estimate against the team's measured velocity.

novel_features.name: Project Inventory
novel_features.description: List Linear projects live, optionally scoped by team, before attaching or auditing portfolio work.

novel_features.name: Project Search
novel_features.description: Search Linear projects live by name with an optional team filter.

novel_features.name: Project Name Resolution
novel_features.description: Resolve one Linear project name to a UUID, preferring exact matches and supporting team scoping.

novel_features.name: Cycle Comparison
novel_features.description: Side-by-side metrics between any two cycles: completion %, scope added, scope cut, carryover, average cycle time.

novel_features.name: Stale Issue Radar
novel_features.description: Find issues that haven't been touched in N days, grouped by team and project.

novel_features.name: Slipped Issues
novel_features.description: Show what carried over from last cycle into this cycle, grouped by team and reason heuristic.

novel_features.name: Blocking Queue
novel_features.description: Show issues you are blocking — sorted by downstream impact (downstream count × downstream priority).

novel_features.name: Duplicate Detection
novel_features.description: Find issues that look like duplicates of a query string using offline FTS5 fuzzy matching.

novel_features.name: Velocity Trends
novel_features.description: Track sprint completion rates over the last N cycles to spot productivity trends.

novel_features.name: Initiatives Health
novel_features.description: Rolled-up portfolio view per initiative: child project progress, milestone target-vs-projected dates, slippage flags.

novel_features.name: Initiative Inventory
novel_features.description: List Linear initiatives live with their current status and URL.

novel_features.name: Initiative Search
novel_features.description: Search Linear initiatives live by name.

novel_features.name: Initiative Name Resolution
novel_features.description: Resolve one Linear initiative name to a UUID, preferring exact matches.

novel_features.name: At-Risk Milestones
novel_features.description: List portfolio milestones whose projected landing date has slipped past their target, ranked by slip magnitude.

novel_features.name: Test Fixture Lifecycle
novel_features.description: List Linear issues this CLI created in the current or named session, then archive them with pp-cleanup.

novel_features.name: Trust Mode Mutation Guard
novel_features.description: Refuse mutations on Linear issues not in the local pp_created ledger when --trust-mode strict is set; works on create and any future mutation surface.

description: Offline-capable, agent-native CLI for the Linear API with SQLite-backed sync, FTS5 search, cross-cycle comparison, project burndown, and pp_created fixture lifecycle for safe live testing.
